name: @pratibimba/agentic-control-room
description: Track 05 T8 — Agentic Run/Review/Autoresearch E2E. Builds the full run flow inside the Agentic Control Room shell (provided by ide-shell-m0-m5/T4): VAK evaluation, route + actor selection, capability tree, run tree, tool stream, diagnostics, abort/retry/continue, evidence deposition, and review decision controls. Enforces the human-required gate at the UI parallel to the gateway-side enforcement (IOD-17 three-way parity).

scripts.test: pnpm build && node --test tests/run-flow.test.mjs tests/human-gate.test.mjs tests/evidence-envelope.test.mjs
